channel.title: INfinance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INfinance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Why strategist Tom Lee believes the AI and crypto selloffs are almost over
item.description: Fundstrat’s Tom Lee says the tech and crypto selloff has gone just about as far as it’s going to go.

item.title: Victory Capital swoops in with counterbid for Janus Henderson
item.description: Victory Capital says it’s mounted a bid for Janus Henderson that’s 16% higher than the $7.4 billion bid from Trian Fund Management the fund manager al...

item.title: Wall Street is courting Main Street with shiny private-market products — the risks are hiding in plain sight
item.description: Private credit and other institutional investments are now within reach for individuals. But their promises don’t always align with your portfolio.

item.title: If you can’t beat the market, you’d better hope it falls
item.description: Investment professionals rarely outperform in a bull market. If you want stock picking to pay off, you’re essentially rooting for a crash.

item.title: Private-credit managers are betting your money on a market that has never been truly stress-tested
item.description: Retail investors seeking fast cash could trigger a financial crisis.

item.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
item.description: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.

item.title: Financial Services Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: Gain insight on Experian, SoFi Technologies and more in the latest Market Talks covering Financial Services.

item.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
item.description: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia...

item.title: Arabica Coffee Prices Hit Record on U.S., Colombia Tariff Spat
item.description: Arabica coffee prices hit a record level, as traders digested the withdrawal of President Trump’s threats to impose tariffs and economic sanctions on ...

item.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
item.description: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
